parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies which view of the resource to return (which attributes should be present in the response). If a valid view is not provided, it will default to normal.

first_name.description: The First Name of the Company Person

last_name.description: The Last Name of the Company Person

is_employee.description: The Employee status of the Company Person

employee_id.description: The Employee ID of the Company Person

active.description: The active status of the Company Person

origin_id.description: The Origin ID of the Company User

job_title.description: The Job Title of the Company Person

work_classification_id.description: The unique identifier for the work classification of the Company Person.
